facebook.content:
Hey friends, it's Pastor Tammy here. I want to remind you that our lives are a worship. Every moment, every breath, every choice is an opportunity to give thanks and praise to God. 

Join me in-person on the first Saturday of each month at 12 Noon at our Southfield location. We'd love to have you there, lifting our voices and hands together in worship.

Or, if you can't make it in person, join me daily online during our Hour of Power, Monday to Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live.
facebook.fullPost:
Hey friends, it's Pastor Tammy here. I want to remind you that our lives are a worship. Every moment, every breath, every choice is an opportunity to give thanks and praise to God. 

Join me in-person on the first Saturday of each month at 12 Noon at our Southfield location. We'd love to have you there, lifting our voices and hands together in worship.

Or, if you can't make it in person, join me daily online during our Hour of Power, Monday to Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live.

Join us for worship
https://increasingfaith.net/visit.html

#Faith #KingdomLiving #Jesus

instagram.content:
Come join the worship experience at IFM. It's where you can let go of everything and just be still. In-person, every First Saturday at 12 Noon, Southfield. Join us online, Monday to Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live - just press play and let the worship begin.

Who's joining us next Saturday?
